caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold, and a gold watch sits at a desk in a studio. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring repeating "UNICORN HUSTLE" logos and stars, and a sign behind him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him, and a black mug with red text that reads "TIME TO TALK OUT" sits on the desk. Throughout the clip, the man is speaking and gesturing; he starts with his hands open and moving, then brings his hands together and clasps them, and eventually rests his left arm on the desk while continuing to talk. His facial expressions shift as he speaks, looking slightly to the side and then toward the front.
